rows.label: tev001493_MSG0001
rows.name: Fancy meeting you here, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0002
rows.name:
As you can see, I was just
having my gun serviced.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0003
rows.name:
I've been working with her since we were
back on Earth. She knows exactly what I
want, and always tunes it to perfection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0004
rows.name:
How about you, [ST:playername ]? How do you
keep your weapons maintained?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_JNK0010
rows.name: Shrug

rows.label: tev001493_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Iriina that you don't really perform maintenance.

rows.label: tev001493_JNK0020
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: tev001493_SEL0021
rows.name: Brag about your rigorous and amazing personalized maintenance routine.

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0005
rows.name:
What, ever?! Wow. You must
like living on the edge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0006
rows.name:
But don't you understand that if you don't keep
your equipment optimized at all times, something
is certain to go horribly, horribly wrong?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0007
rows.name:
Armor is one thing—that just hurts
you if it fails. But weapons protect
the lives of friends and comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0008
rows.name:
And if you value them, you need to do
everything possible to protect them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0009
rows.name:
Although if I had to guess, I'd say
that Lin probably cleans and maintains
your weapon while you're asleep.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0010
rows.name:
That girl is always looking out for
her friends. Meanwhile, you're so
careless you haven't even noticed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then you're the sort of [ST:gender p1=man p2=woman ]people
can count on. No wonder the
colonel took you under her wing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0012
rows.name:
Armor is one thing—that just hurts
you if it fails. But weapons protect
the lives of friends and comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0013
rows.name:
If you don't keep them in perfect
condition, you might not be able to
give your all when your team needs you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0014
rows.name:
Have you heard of a man
named Mondo, by the way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: tev001493_SEL0031
rows.name: Claim to know all about Mondo.

rows.label: tev001493_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: tev001493_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you don't recognize the name.

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0015
rows.name: Heh. You guys must have met, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0016
rows.name: He's from Lao's team. Real low-key guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0017
rows.name:
Give Mondo a gun you want
serviced, and he'll do you
better than any mechanic in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0018
rows.name:
Gwin was so impressed, he actually
asked to be Mondo's apprentice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0019
rows.name:
So lately, whenever Gwin has a
free moment, he disassembles
his weapon and gets to work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'm sure it's great practice, but...
Well, it's starting to get weird.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0021
rows.name:
Like, when he's done? He always
spends a few moments stroking it
with the tips of his fingers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0022
rows.name:
And then—I kid you not—he LICKS
it! It's maybe the most revolting
thing I've ever seen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0023
rows.name:
So next time you run into Gwin, tell him
not to be such a creep-o, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0024
rows.name:
Give Mondo a gun you want
serviced, and he'll do you
better than any mechanic in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0025
rows.name:
Gwin actually became his apprentice and
was starting to learn his secrets.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0026
rows.name:
But I guess Mondo won't be able
to teach Gwin anything again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0027
rows.name:
To think that so skilled a BLADE
could be brought down like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0028
rows.name:
Even when your weapons are in pristine
condition, I guess we all eventually face
a threat that's just too big to handle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0029
rows.name:
When my time comes, I don't
want to be regretting that I
cut corners prepping my gear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0030
rows.name: You can't ignore the little things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001493_MSG0031
rows.name:
Sometimes the little things are all
that keep us BLADEs alive out there.[ST:wait ]
